title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland
summary: Alice falls down a long way into darkness suddenly alone.
coverScene: Alice stands in a beautiful garden surrounded by tall flowers and towering trees, with a curious expression on her face.

sentences.text: Alice fell down a very deep hole.
She was very afraid inside it.
Alice did not know what to do next.
She had never been in such a dark place before.
This new place made her feel very small.
But she could see nothing at all.
She felt quite lost in this place.
She wanted to go back up.
Then, Alice saw a small table.
It stood there in the dark.
The table was made of glass.
On the table, there was a tiny gold key.
Alice felt very happy to find this key.
She thought the key could help her.
She believed it would help her leave this strange place.
She held it with her small hand.
This key was her only hope.
Alice started to look for a door.
She walked around the dark room.
Soon, she found a small door.
It was low on the wall.
Alice used her new gold key.
She put the key in the lock.
The key fit the lock perfectly.
But the door was very, very small.
It was just a little opening in the wall.
Alice wanted to go through the door.
She wished to know what was outside.
But she was much too big to pass through.
Her head could not even fit inside.
Alice did not know what to do now.
She felt very sad about this problem.
She had worked to find a way out.
But she could not use it at all.
There was no clear path for her.
Alice wished she could be small.
She closed her eyes for a moment.
If she can be small, she will go through.
Then she will see what is on the other side.
This will be a great new experience for her.
She has always wanted a big new journey.
She has wished for a special trip.
She wants to find a new world.
This idea made her feel a bit better.
Alice thought about her own life.
She also thought about her friends.
She remembered her dear cat, Dinah.
She had left them far above the ground.
She hoped to see them again soon.
She felt a little alone now.
She was far from her home.
A white animal spoke very fast.
The animal was moving very fast.
It seemed to be in a rush.
He said, "Oh dear! I am very late!"
He had to go quickly from there.
This was a truly strange sight.
Alice decided to follow the white animal.
She went through a long passage.
But she could still hear the white animal's voice.
He was always saying he was late.
Alice followed the sound of his fast feet.
She went deeper into the dark.
Then Alice came to a big hall.
They were on every side of the hall.
But all the doors were locked.
Alice had not found an open door yet.
She had looked at each one.
She needed to find a new key now.
Without it, she could not pass.
She had walked for a long time.
She wanted to find a way out of here.
But she did not know how to leave.
She looked at all the locked doors.
She felt she did not know what to do next.
Alice just wanted to go home.
She wanted to be back with Dinah.
She hoped to find her way soon.
